title: Diamond Anniversary Independence Medium Hybrid 12" Mattress

seo.title: Diamond Anniversary Independence 12" Medium Hybrid Mattress | LA Mattress
seo.description: Diamond Anniversary Independence — 12" medium hybrid mattress in patriotic red, white & blue. CertiPUR-US foam, Dynamic Edge coils, Greenguard Gold, 20-year warranty. Queen from $899 with free same-day LA delivery.

metafields.custom.tagline: The patriotic, ship-in-a-box hybrid — built for the way LA sleeps.
metafields.custom.lede: Diamond's anniversary edition pairs a Greenguard Gold–certified hybrid build with a head-turning red, white & blue cover. CertiPUR-US foam layers cushion the shoulders and hips; Dynamic Edge wrapped coils hold support all the way to the perimeter. Compressed in a box for clean apartment delivery, with a 20-year warranty behind every Queen we ship.
custom.best_for: Couples who want one medium that fits two sleep styles
Back and side sleepers who switch positions overnight
Hot sleepers — the cool-temperature regulating cover does real work
Anyone with a tight stairwell — ships compressed in a box
custom.not_ideal_for: Strict stomach sleepers who need maximum spinal flatness
Shoppers above 280 lbs who'll want a firmer-core build

description_html:
The Diamond Anniversary Independence is a 12-inch medium hybrid mattress built around a CertiPUR-US foam comfort stack and a Dynamic Edge wrapped coil system, with a Greenguard Gold certification and a patriotic red, white & blue cover that reads as a quiet wink rather than a costume. It ships compressed in a box, lands on your bed in minutes, and is backed by Diamond Mattress's 20-year warranty.

What's inside

  • Cool-temperature regulating cover — phase-change yarns pull heat off the surface, so you don't wake up flipping the pillow at 3 a.m.
  • CertiPUR-US comfort foam — independently certified for low-VOC content and durability; layered for shoulder and hip pressure relief.
  • Dynamic Edge wrapped coil system — individually pocketed steel coils with reinforced perimeter, so the bed feels usable corner-to-corner.
  • Greenguard Gold certified — meets the strictest indoor-air emissions standard, audited by a third party.
  • High-density foam base — anchors the build, extends mattress lifespan, and dampens partner motion transfer.

Who it's for

The Independence sits squarely at a medium feel (5 / 10). That makes it the easy pick when two sleepers in the same bed sleep differently — a side sleeper gets enough give to relieve the shoulder, a back sleeper gets enough support to keep the lower spine neutral. Strict stomach sleepers or shoppers who specifically want a firmer-than-medium core are better off in the Black Diamond Rockwell or Dreamstage 2.0 Firm.

Sizes & prices

Available in Twin, Twin XL, Full, Queen, King, and California King — Queen from $899. See size selector above for current pricing on each size. Every size ships compressed in a box; white-glove delivery + old mattress haul-away is included free on every Queen+ order delivered in Los Angeles.

Why this mattress, and why now

Diamond Mattress has been hand-building in California since 1946 and is one of the few remaining brands that backs its own warranty at the factory rather than offloading claims to a third-party clearinghouse. The Anniversary Independence is a limited-build hybrid released to mark the 4th of July — the same construction Diamond ships year-round, in a one-time red-white-and-blue cover. When the run is gone, it's gone.

What's included

  • Free white-glove delivery anywhere in Los Angeles on orders $499+, including setup.
  • Free haul-away of your old mattress on every Queen+ delivery.
  • Same-day delivery on orders placed by 4 p.m.
  • 120-night comfort exchange — try it for at least 30 nights, then swap for another mattress if it isn't right.
  • 20-year Diamond Mattress warranty against manufacturer defects, processed in-house.
